{{Quote|Supposedly he can kill a man just by looking at him. I heard a rumor that he was once a Jedi.|Zam Stenza, about [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]|<ref name="Death Star (novel)">[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']]</ref>}}
'''Zam Stenza''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] medical orderly assigned to the [[N-One Medcenter]] of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first]] [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Appearances==
*[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] {{1st}}
